title: Pokimane's Return Stream was a Disaster
description:
In her first stream back on Twitch, Pokimane continues to stand on a moral soapbox larping as if she's some amazingly intellectual revolutionary.... Unfortunately for Pokimane, that didn't really go so well to say the least.
